final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury beauty product shot for social media marketing.

Style/medium: luxury product photography, editorial beauty campaign aesthetic, clean and refined
Composition: centered product hero shot, slightly elevated three-quarter angle, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh
Subject: glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through transparent glass, elegant minimalist packaging design
Scene/backdrop: soft pink gradient background transitioning from blush to pale rose, floating rose petals scattered around, water droplets captured mid-splash
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light from the side, gentle highlights on glass surface, luxurious and serene atmosphere
Color palette: warm pink gradient base, golden liquid as focal accent, soft rose petal pinks, clear water reflections
Materials/textures: transparent glass with refractive qualities, silky liquid interior, delicate velvety rose petals, crisp water droplets
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, plastic-looking textures, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic
